calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-27-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-08-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Sze-Hang Lo, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Limin Ruan, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Coung Diep or Hui Hing Import & Export Trading.
Default were entered against defendants on May 14, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, July 8, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Limin Ruan, and against the Defaulted Defendants Coung Diep and Hui Hing Import & Export Trading as follows:

Damages/Principal - $60,615.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $8,288.49.
Costs - $760.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $69,633.49.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
